The Brand

We're not
a f*cking gym.

In 2015, with a reality show prize and an idea nobody took seriously, Wilder Zapata opened the first studio in Medellín. Ten years later: 61 units. 10 countries. $58.2M valuation. The waitlist exists — the dropout rate, barely.

Action Black was born from the conviction that the traditional gym failed people. The answer was radical: multiple specialised boutique studios under one roof, one membership, technology, neuroscience and entertainment fused into an experience you can't escape. Training stopped being an obligation — it became a ritual.

Tribeca. Flatiron. Ortega y Gasset. When New York and Madrid say yes, the concept is proven. Named by Forbes as one of 30 Promises, with declared plans to list on Wall Street — Action Black doesn't compete on price. It competes on value. And wins.

61
Units open · 10 countries
$58M
Current brand valuation
2%
Churn rate — vs. 30% industry average
€89
Monthly fee — below European boutique benchmark
Why Action Black wins

12 modalities under one roof. Every time a member thinks about leaving, they remember a class they haven't tried yet.

60 minutes. Always. Results visible in 30 days. 2% churn when the industry averages 30%.

Nightclub design, neuroscience, technology. An identity — not a gym. Members don't buy workouts. They buy a lifestyle.

12 Modalities · 1 Membership
2015
Born from a bet.
Medellín, Aranjuez. $300K from a reality show, one idea, and the conviction that gyms had been wrong for decades.
2019
21 units. Valued at $28M.
SmartFit and Bodytech tried to buy it. Regulatory issues blocked the deal. In hindsight, lucky.
2021
The pandemic created Action Black.
From the crisis came the definitive model: premium boutique, multi-modality, neuroscience applied to training.
2024
New York. Madrid. $58M.
Tribeca, Flatiron, Ortega y Gasset. Forbes 30 Promises. Wall Street on the horizon. 61 units.
2026
Lisbon. This is where you come in.
Saldanha · São Sebastião · Parque das Nações — and the Portuguese market has seen nothing like this.

The Market

Portugal:
vergonhosamente subpenetrado.

Less than 1% of Portuguese gyms are boutique. Spain is already at 12%. UK at 16%. Lisbon is the obvious market that hasn't been captured yet.

Why Lisbon. Why Now.
01
Boutique fitness under 1% in Portugal. Spain at 12%. UK at 16%. The gap is the opportunity.
02
3 prime Lisbon locations already secured. No site hunt. No surprises. Ready to build.
03
Royalties locked at 5% on the 3 ABLX clubs — vs. 8% standard. Built into the contract.
04
Exclusive master franchise for Portugal. Preferential access to Spain. Two markets, one business.

Everyone eats from the same table.

Márcio and team have skin in the game. They only win if you win.

Quarterly distributions from Year 2. You don't wait for the exit to see money.

Exit by EBITDA multiple. Same mechanism as any PE fund. No surprises.

Tag-along and co-sale rights included. You're never trapped.

Estrutura

ABPT e ABLX:
Four SPVs. Completely separate.

The investment is made directly into ABLX — the SPV that operates the 3 Lisbon clubs. ABPT is the master franchise holding company.

Full ring-fence:<The ABLX investor (Phase 1) is never diluted by Phase 2. Phase 2 SPVs are autonomous vehicles — each with its own capitalisation.
O Que Significa Para o Investidor
Direct investment in ABLXThe investor holds 40% of the operational SPV — not the master franchise holding. Direct exposure to the 3 clubs' cash flows.
Nenhum envolvimento operacionalABPT manages the entire operation. The investor receives quarterly dividends with no management responsibilities.
Full legal protectionShareholders Agreement with drag-along, tag-along and defined exit mechanisms. Annual independent audit.
Expansion upsideThe 3 ABLX clubs are the flagship units of the network. They benefit from preferential royalties (5% cap) and the full ABC infrastructure.
Optional exit from Year 3Via M&A, CEO buyback or sale to approved third party. Reference multiple: 7× platform EBITDA.
ABPT vs ABLX — what's what
ABPTHolds the master franchise rights. Manages the network. Collects royalties from each future sub-franchisee.
ABLXOperates the 3 flagship clubs. Generates EBITDA directly. This is the proposed investment vehicle.

The Team

As Pessoas
Behind the Brand

ABC Corporation S.A.S. · Medellín, Colombia
Wilder Zapata Torres
CEO & Co-Founder

Founded in 2015. From reality TV to CEO of Latin America's largest boutique chain. Led expansion to 8 countries in 10 years.

Daniela Arboleda
CFO & Co-Founder

CFO. Leads the financial structure of international expansion and commercial terms with franchisees.

Felipe Pavas
COO & Co-Founder

Operations. 9+ years in fitness. Oversees studio operations across the global network.

Kevin Zapata
CMO & Co-Founder

Marketing. 9+ years building Action Black's identity and community across all markets.

Alejandro Herrera
Director Técnico & Co-Founder

Product development and training methodology. 10+ years designing Action Black's modality systems.

Natasha Valencia
CINO & Co-Founder

Innovation. 6+ years leading product development and user experience across all studios.

Diego Aguirre
Expansion Director & Co-Founder

International expansion. 10+ years of experience, 16+ new locations developed in the global network.

Julián Vásquez
Strategy Director

Corporate strategy and business development across international markets.

Esteban Lozada
CTO

Technology. Leads the Action Black app, booking platform and digital ecosystem.

Action Black Portugal · Lisboa
Márcio Correa
CEO & COO · Portugal

19+ years in fitness. Former Product Management Director ABC/EVO. Built the Portugal master franchise from scratch.

Noara Pozzer
CMO · Portugal

Harvard Business School. MBA La Verne CA & Mackenzie. 500+ companies. Leads ABPT's marketing strategy.

Talita Tamelini
Directora Comercial

Green Jacket Partners. Triatlo Portugal. Women in Tech. Parcerias comerciais e desenvolvimento B2B.

Julio César Mayoral
Controller · ABPT

Former CFO Station 24. Founder The Berry Co. Financial control, reporting and investor relations.

Félix Tarrão
Legal & Compliance

Lawyer specialised in commercial law and regulatory compliance. Ensures ABPT's compliance with Portuguese and European legal framework.
